parameters.command:
export GIT_URL="{{ $json.auth_clone_url || $json.clone_url }}"
export GIT_REF="{{ $json.branch }}"
cd /tmp && rm -rf scan-repo 2>/dev/null; git clone --depth 1 --branch "$GIT_REF" "$GIT_URL" scan-repo 2>/dev/null && cd scan-repo && (syft . -o json > /tmp/sbom.json 2>/dev/null; true) && trivy fs . --severity CRITICAL -f json 2>/dev/null || echo '{"Results":[]}'
